NAME: UK Biobank — Olink proteomics flagship pQTL
DESCRIPTION: UK Biobank Pharma Proteomics Project (UKB-PPP) released Olink Proximity Extension Assay proteomics for ~53k participants, covering ~2,900 plasma proteins. Flagship pQTL resource for cis/trans protein QTL mapping.
TITLE: Plasma proteomic associations with genetics and health in the UK Biobank
